

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)


df <- read_csv(here("analysis/data/raw_data/project_data/twitter_na_2017-09_ny.csv.gz"))

posts_per_user <- df %>%
  group_by(u_id) %>%
  summarise(post_count = n())

ggplot(posts_per_user, aes(x = post_count)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "blue", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Posts per Account - September 2017",
    x = "Number of Posts",
    y = "Number of Accounts"
  )

ggplot(posts_per_user, aes(x = post_count)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Posts per Account - September 2017",
    x = "Number of Posts",
    y = "Number of Accounts"
  )
```


```{r}
summary(posts_per_user$post_count)
```


```{r}

```


```{r}

```


```{r}

```


```{r}

```
